creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm sorry for that, I just commit the changes to move ufraw from SF to GH,
but I can't do more. If the bug remains it should be reported to upstream.
In that case is https://github.com/sergiomb2/ufraw.

BTW, the github repo is a fork, not handled by the project founders, but that's open source ecosystem, when someone drops it's project, you are free to fork and continue the work.
